practice_standards.name: CUSPAP (Canadian Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice)
practice_standards.why_it_matters: Governs appraisal practice requirements; AIC members must comply with CUSPAP.

practice_standards.name: RECA Residential Measurement Standard (RMS)
practice_standards.why_it_matters: Alberta licensees must use RMS when measuring/advertising residential property; detached homes are measured using the exterior wall at foundation.

sources.name: CUSPAP (Canadian Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice)
sources.why_it_matters: Governs appraisal practice requirements; AIC members must comply with CUSPAP.

sources.name: RECA Residential Measurement Standard (RMS)
sources.why_it_matters: Alberta licensees must use RMS when measuring/advertising residential property; detached homes are measured using the exterior wall at foundation.

sources.name: Calgary Assessment Details Report
sources.why_it_matters: Contains current assessment, property type, property details, use, class, site influences, title number, legal description, LINC, declared value, land use, and permit existence.

sources.name: Open Calgary — Current & Historical Assessment
sources.why_it_matters: Calgary publishes current and historical parcel assessment datasets.

sources.name: Open Calgary — Parcel Address / OPF
sources.why_it_matters: Needed for address normalization, parcel geometry, plan/block/lot, and area.

sources.name: Open Calgary — Land Use Districts
sources.why_it_matters: Needed to check legal use, zoning district, and highest-and-best-use.

sources.name: Open Calgary — Community Boundaries
sources.why_it_matters: Needed to define neighbourhood/submarket and comp search boundaries.

sources.name: Open Calgary — Building Permits
sources.why_it_matters: Needed to verify renovations, basement development, additions, garages, etc.

sources.name: Open Calgary — Development Permits
sources.why_it_matters: Needed for legality, land-use changes, major redevelopments, discretionary approvals.

sources.name: Calgary Land Use Bylaw
sources.why_it_matters: Authoritative text for permitted uses, setbacks, and development standards.

sources.name: Alberta SPIN2 — Certificate of Title
sources.why_it_matters: Current title is available as a certified PDF and describes ownership rights and registered instruments/caveats.

sources.name: Alberta SPIN2 — Registered Survey Plan
sources.why_it_matters: Registered survey plans are available through SPIN2 or registry agents; digital copies are TIF.

sources.name: Real Property Report (RPR)
sources.why_it_matters: Shows improvements relative to parcel boundaries for compliance and area checks.

sources.name: Pillar 9 / MLS / REALTOR Systems
sources.why_it_matters: Needed for real comparable sales, listing remarks, DOM, photos, sale conditions, and listing history. Pillar 9 aggregates Alberta listing data.

sources.name: CREB Monthly Market Report
sources.why_it_matters: Needed for time adjustments, market direction, inventory, benchmark price, sales/new listings ratio.

sources.name: KV Capital Assignment Package
sources.why_it_matters: Lender assignment order, borrower application, and engagement instructions.
